title: Huawei FTTR Termination Kit FTK01, Single-mode
description: The FTK01 kit includes FTTR fiber termination tools (optical cable stripper, coating stripper, and fiber cutter) and is designed to be used with a field-mountable connector (FMC2105) . This kit does not require special crimping tools or live devices, allowing for simple and efficient fiber termination on-site. FTK01 is an ideal solution for FTTx home connections , FTTR indoor optical networks , and ONU installations User-Friendly No need for special crimping tools or live devices such as optical fiber fusion splicers Skilled technicians achieve a success rate of at least 95% on the first assembly, with installation taking less than three minutes Includes a complete toolset, easy to carry, and requires an FMC2105 connector for precise assembly Unique Design Provides a complete toolset for precise fiber stripping and reliable assembly of the FMC2105 connector Supports optical cables of 1.2 mm x 1.6 mm , 1.6 mm x 2 mm , and 2 mm x 3 mm The FMC2105 connector is compatible with standard SC adapters Reliable Performance Reusable: The FMC2105 connector can be reassembled at least five times Long-Term Reliability: The connector has passed a 500-hour accelerated aging test at 75°C and 95% relative humidity Extreme Environment Adaptability: The connector has passed a temperature cycle test (-40°C to +80°C), water immersion test, and salt spray test Eco-Friendly & Safe: The FMC2105 connector and FTK01 kit comply with RoHS and REACH certification standards FTK01 is the ideal solution for fast, reliable, and high-quality fiber optic installations across various network applications
